use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF EXCESSIVE FEMALE FACIAL HAIR

indications.text:
VANIQA is indicated for the reduction of unwanted facial hair in women.
VANIQA has only been studied on the face and adjacent involved areas under the chin of
affected individuals. Usage should be limited to these areas of involvement.
